Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: White linen shirt, black trousers, silver vine-leaf pocket watch
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein tells the police he has forgotten everything that happened recently.

Bitsch Mountbatten.hair_style: short with a full brown beard
Bitsch Mountbatten.primary_clothing: Black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform, peak cap with senior sergeant chevrons
Bitsch Mountbatten.face_description: Rough and brutal features, dominated by a thick brown beard and a stern, intimidating expression.
Bitsch Mountbatten.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, stocky build, full brown beard, wearing a black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform and peak cap.
Bitsch Mountbatten.color_palette: charcoal black, stark white, earthy brown, silver
Bitsch Mountbatten.distinguishing_features: Slightly sharp voice with an Awwa accent
Bitsch Mountbatten.source_notes: Described as the street policeman with a brown beard and sharp voice.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: working class Victorian attire, simple worn suit
Benson Moretti.face_description: ordinary face with signs of fatigue from working hard to support his family
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Described as Klein's older brother who works at an import and export company. Visuals are guessed based on setting and relation to Klein.
